project_id.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Primary key; matches `projects.id` (stringified) in the app DB.

user_id.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Creating user; matches `users.id`. Used for RLS on `project_entry_states`.

entry_pattern.description: x-ui-surface=section:onboarding.entry-cards | Which of the 3 cards the user picked.

pipeline_start_submodule.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Orchestrator hint: where to start the pipeline. Enforced against entry_pattern by the refine below.

github_repo_url.description: x-ui-surface=page:/projects/new | Public GitHub repo URL. When present, triggers repo-scan auto-infer of D0/D3/D7/D9/D10/D12.

market_url.description: x-ui-surface=page:/projects/new | Live product / marketing site URL. Feeds industry + business-model inference.

architecture_doc_upload_url.description: x-ui-surface=page:/projects/new | Signed-URL pointer to user-uploaded architecture doc (PDF/MD). Optional prose input to M3 reverse-derivation.

pain_points.description: x-ui-surface=page:/projects/new | Pain-point checkbox selection. Maps to M4 sensitivity-lens weights.

pain_points_other.description: x-ui-surface=page:/projects/new | Free-text pain-point (only meaningful when `pain_points` contains `other`).

current_dau_estimate.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Rough DAU band the user supplied on the Existing card. Feeds D4 as empirical (not aspirational).

existing_project_signals.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Brownfield signals — required iff entry_pattern=existing; forbidden otherwise.
